reviews.title: Bright and Fun Balloons for Any Celebration!
reviews.body: These Bezente Assorted Rainbow Balloons really made our party pop with color! The 12-inch size is perfect for decorations, and the rainbow assortment looks cheerful and vibrant once inflated. They hold helium well and float for quite a while, which is great for birthdays and events. The latex quality feels decent — most balloons inflated easily without popping. However, a few had slight inconsistencies in size and thickness, which is why I’m giving 4 stars instead of 5. Overall, they’re colorful, durable, and a great value for money, perfect for weddings, showers, or festive gatherings!

note: Amazon could not be opened directly from this environment, and most accessible snippets did not expose per-review star ratings. I only included the review whose rating was explicitly visible in the extracted text.
